records.name: Portfolio Workspace Matrix Scanner
records.description: Scans local portfolio fixtures to collect workspace inventory, pack inventory, validation status, readiness status, evidence gaps, and impact warnings.

records.name: Portfolio Summary Generator Capability
records.description: Represents the future capability to emit deterministic portfolio summaries after JSON report shape is designed.

records.name: Portfolio Local Validation Runner
records.description: Runs local portfolio example validation, lint, readiness, and graph checks while hosted CI remains the workflow gate.
records.command: verity validate examples/portfolio && verity lint examples/portfolio --strict && verity readiness examples/portfolio --strict && verity graph examples/portfolio

records.name: Portfolio Readiness Dashboard Surface
records.description: Represents a future dashboard surface for reviewing portfolio readiness, evidence, dependency, and impact summaries.

records.name: Portfolio Agent Context Exporter
records.description: Exports bounded context for agents working on future portfolio validation, dependency, and aggregate report implementation.
records.privacyPolicy: Do not include secrets, credentials, customer data, or unpublished commercial terms in exported portfolio context.
records.redactionPolicy: Summarize private workspace names when downstream repositories require confidentiality.
